based on a report by Jim Meyering, I went over and added checks for return codes for all calls to malloc and strdup that were missing. I also changed a few malloc(13) to use arrays on the stack and a few malloc(PATH_MAX) to instead use aprintf() to lower memory use. I also fixed a memory leak in Curl_nss_connect() when CURLOPT_ISSUERCERT is in use.
